hooks.command: jq -n --arg branch "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" --arg status "$(git status -s 2>/dev/null)" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: ("Current git branch: " + $branch + "\nWorking tree:\n" + (if $status == "" then "(clean)" else $status end))}}'

jq -n --arg branch "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" --arg ahead "$(git log main..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null)" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", additionalContext: ("Branch verification before git commit/push:
Current branch: " + $branch + "
Commits ahead of main:
" + (if $ahead == "" then "(none)" else $ahead end) + "

If this is NOT the branch you explicitly created with `git checkout -b` for this task, STOP. The harness can silently switch branches between commands; do not proceed without re-confirming with the user.")}}'

jq -n --arg branch "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" --arg ahead "$(git log main..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null)" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", additionalContext: ("Branch verification before git commit/push:
Current branch: " + $branch + "
Commits ahead of main:
" + (if $ahead == "" then "(none)" else $ahead end) + "

If this is NOT the branch you explicitly created with `git checkout -b` for this task, STOP. The harness can silently switch branches between commands; do not proceed without re-confirming with the user.")}}'
